name: Credit Advisors Council - Credit Repair NYC
description_short: Credit Advisors Council - Credit Repair NYC is a credit repair provider based in New York, New York. Rated 3.7/5 with 12 Google reviews, reflecting solid customer satisfaction.
description_long:
Credit Advisors Council - Credit Repair NYC is a credit repair provider serving clients in New York, New York. Carrying a 3.7/5.0 Google rating from 12 reviews, Credit Advisors Council - Credit Repair NYC has an solid reputation among consumers in the New York area looking to repair and improve their credit scores.

Operating as a financial consultant, Credit Advisors Council - Credit Repair NYC provides a range of services for consumers seeking credit repair solutions.

When evaluating credit repair services in New York, consumers should look for providers that dispute directly with all three credit bureaus — Equifax, Experian, and TransUnion. Key differentiators include transparency around pricing, realistic timelines for results, and whether the company offers a money-back guarantee. Credit Advisors Council - Credit Repair NYC operates in a highly regulated industry under the Credit Repair Organizations Act (CROA), which requires written contracts, a three-day cancellation window, and prohibits upfront fees before services are rendered.

Consumers in the New York, New York area who are considering Credit Advisors Council - Credit Repair NYC should contact the company directly to discuss their specific situation and get current pricing information. As with any credit repair provider, it is advisable to compare multiple options, verify licensing and credentials, and read recent customer reviews before making a decision.
